source:
#Get Parameter from controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_Silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Silver_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

#Set table name
db_tablename="nem12_silver"
Bronze_notebookname="aemo_bronze"
Bronze_tablename="nem12_bronze"

# Create AEMO Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_silver =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_silver:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create NEM12 Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "NEM12" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12")
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

# Create database if exists
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")

# Create silver table
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    Nem12HashKey STRING,
    CDC_CurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    CDC_LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    MSATSLoadDateTime STRING,
    CreationDate STRING,
    CDC_Ops INT,
    Year INT, 
    VersionHeader STRING,
    FromParticipant STRING,
    ToParticipant STRING,
    IntervalDate STRING,
    IntervalLength DOUBLE,
    IntervalIndex INT,
    Timestamp TIMESTAMP,
    DisplayTimestamp_d STRING,
    DateHashId STRING, 
    NormalizedTimeStart STRING,
    NormalizedTimeEnd STRING,
    TimeHashId STRING,
    NMI STRING,
    NMIHashId STRING,
    NMIConfiguration STRING,
    RegisterID STRING,
    NMISuffix STRING,
    ChannelHashId STRING,
    ReasonCodeId STRING,
    ReasonCodeHashId STRING,
    ReasonDescription STRING,
    FinalReasonCodeId STRING, 
    FinalReasonCodeHashId STRING,
    TransCodeId STRING,
    TransCodeHashId STRING,
    UnitOfMeasurementId STRING,
    UnitOfMeasurementHashId STRING,
    QualityMethodId STRING,
    QualityFlag STRING,
    QualityFlagHashId STRING,
    MethodFlag STRING,
    MethodFlagHashId STRING, 
    FinalQualityMethodId STRING,
    FinalQualityFlag STRING,
    FinalQualityFlagHashId STRING,
    FinalMethodFlag STRING, 
    FinalMethodFlagHashId STRING,
    MDMDataStreamIdentifier STRING,
    MeterSerialNumber STRING, 
    NextScheduledReadDate STRING,  
    RetServiceOrder STRING, 
    ReadDatetime STRING,
    IndexRead STRING,
    Usage_d DOUBLE, 
    Usage DOUBLE,
    FileName STRING
)
USING delta
PARTITIONED BY (Year)
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT *
                        FROM (
                                SELECT
                                    Nem12HashKey
                                    ,'true' AS CDC_CurrentFlag
                                    ,VersionHeader
                                    ,Timestamp
                                    ,DisplayTimestamp_d
                                    ,FromParticipant
                                    ,ToParticipant
                                    ,NMI
                                    ,NMIConfiguration
                                    ,RegisterID
                                    ,NMISuffix
                                    ,MDMDataStreamIdentifier
                                    ,MeterSerialNumber
                                    ,UnitOfMeasurementId
                                    ,IntervalLength
                                    ,IntervalIndex
                                    ,IntervalDate
                                    ,NextScheduledReadDate
                                    ,Usage
                                    ,FinalQualityMethodId
                                    ,FinalReasonCodeId
                                    ,MSATSLoadDateTime
                                    ,QualityMethodId
                                    ,ReasonCodeId
                                    ,ReasonDescription
                                    ,NormalizedTimeStart
                                    ,NormalizedTimeEnd
                                    ,TransCodeId
                                    ,RetServiceOrder
                                    ,ReadDatetime
                                    ,IndexRead
                                    ,FileName
                                    ,CDC_LoadDate
                                    ,1 AS CDC_Ops
                                    ,CreationDate
                                    ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                                        PARTITION BY 
                                            NMI,
                                            IntervalDate,
                                            IntervalIndex,
                                            NMISuffix,
                                            FromParticipant
                                        ORDER BY 
                                            MSATSLoadDateTime DESC, 
                                            CreationDate DESC,
                                            FileName DESC
                                    ) AS FileRank
                                FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{Bronze_tablename}
                                Order by Nem12HashKey)
                        WHERE FileRank = 1
                    """)

###DevOps ticket #17208###
#Added FileName to the ORDER BY clause and IntervalIndex to the PARTITION BY clause for this because we have files that have been 
#loaded into Bronze twice, some in the same load (same CDC_LoadDate). We only want to progress one of those sets of records otherwise 
#we have duplicated rows.
display(df_silver)

df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("Usage_d",df_silver["Usage"])

# Replace NULL values in usage 
df_silver = df_silver.na.fill({"Usage_d":0})

from pyspark.sql.functions import *

# # Create NMIHashKey 
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("NMIHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||","NMI"),256))

# # Create ChannelHashKey 
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("ChannelHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","NMIConfiguration","RegisterID","NMISuffix"),256))

# Create ReasonCodeHash
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("ReasonCodeHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","ReasonCodeId"),256))

# Create FinalReasonCodeHash
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("FinalReasonCodeHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","FinalReasonCodeId"),256))

# Create TransCodeHash
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("TransCodeHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","TransCodeId"),256))

# Create UnitOfMeasurementHash
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("UnitOfMeasurementHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","UnitOfMeasurementId"),256))

# Create QualityMethodHash
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("QualityMethodHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","QualityMethodId"),256))

# Create QualityMethodHash
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("FinalQualityMethodHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","FinalQualityMethodId"),256))

# Create DateHashId 
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("DateHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","IntervalDate"),256) )

# Create TimeHashId
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("TimeIndex",regexp_replace("NormalizedTimeStart",":",""))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("TimeIndex", col("TimeIndex").cast("integer"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("TimeHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","TimeIndex"),256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("Year", date_format(col("Timestamp"), 'yyyy'))

# Quality Method 
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("QualityFlag",substring(col("QualityMethodId"),1,1)).withColumn("MethodFlag",substring(col("QualityMethodId"),2,100))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("QualityFlagHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","QualityFlag"),256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("MethodFlagHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","MethodFlag"),256))

# Final Quality Method 
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("FinalQualityFlag",substring(col("FinalQualityMethodId"),1,1)).withColumn("FinalMethodFlag",substring(col("FinalQualityMethodId"),2,100))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("FinalQualityFlagHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","FinalQualityFlag"),256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("FinalMethodFlagHashId",sha2(concat_ws("||","FinalMethodFlag"),256))
# CDC_CurrentFlag
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDC_CurrentFlag", when(df_silver.FileRank == 1, 'true').otherwise('false'))
display(df_silver)

#rowcount
rowcount = df_silver.count()
print(rowcount)

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
      INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
        (Nem12HashKey,CDC_CurrentFlag,CDC_LoadDate,MSATSLoadDateTime,CreationDate,CDC_Ops,Year,VersionHeader,FromParticipant,ToParticipant,IntervalDate,IntervalLength,IntervalIndex,Timestamp,DisplayTimestamp_d,
                DateHashId,NormalizedTimeStart,NormalizedTimeEnd,TimeHashId,NMI,NMIHashId,NMIConfiguration,RegisterID,NMISuffix,ChannelHashId,ReasonCodeId,ReasonCodeHashId,ReasonDescription,FinalReasonCodeId,
                FinalReasonCodeHashId,TransCodeId,TransCodeHashId,UnitOfMeasurementId,UnitOfMeasurementHashId,QualityMethodId,QualityFlag,QualityFlagHashId,MethodFlag,MethodFlagHashId,FinalQualityMethodId,
                FinalQualityFlag,FinalQualityFlagHashId,FinalMethodFlag,FinalMethodFlagHashId,MDMDataStreamIdentifier,MeterSerialNumber,NextScheduledReadDate,RetServiceOrder,ReadDatetime,IndexRead,Usage_d,Usage,
                FileName)
        SELECT 
                s.Nem12HashKey,s.CDC_CurrentFlag,s.CDC_LoadDate,s.MSATSLoadDateTime,s.CreationDate,s.CDC_Ops,s.Year,s.VersionHeader,s.FromParticipant,s.ToParticipant,s.IntervalDate,s.IntervalLength,s.IntervalIndex,s.Timestamp,s.DisplayTimestamp_d,
                s.DateHashId,s.NormalizedTimeStart,s.NormalizedTimeEnd,s.TimeHashId,s.NMI,s.NMIHashId,s.NMIConfiguration,s.RegisterID,s.NMISuffix,s.ChannelHashId,s.ReasonCodeId,s.ReasonCodeHashId,s.ReasonDescription,s.FinalReasonCodeId,
                s.FinalReasonCodeHashId,s.TransCodeId,s.TransCodeHashId,s.UnitOfMeasurementId,s.UnitOfMeasurementHashId,s.QualityMethodId,s.QualityFlag,s.QualityFlagHashId,s.MethodFlag,s.MethodFlagHashId,s.FinalQualityMethodId,
                s.FinalQualityFlag,s.FinalQualityFlagHashId,s.FinalMethodFlag,s.FinalMethodFlagHashId,s.MDMDataStreamIdentifier,s.MeterSerialNumber,s.NextScheduledReadDate,s.RetServiceOrder,s.ReadDatetime,s.IndexRead,s.Usage_d,s.Usage,
                s.FileName
        FROM temp_table s;

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_Ops = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)
display(log_data)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
